snippet.title: Toys game
snippet.description:
🍫 Welcome to My Channel! 🍬

This channel is all about satisfying candy counting, chocolate cutting, and relaxing ASMR live streams! I go LIVE daily and count different types of chocolates, Kinder Joy, Skittles, Choco Beans, and many more delicious treats.

If you love:
✨ Candy Counting
✨ Chocolate Cutting
✨ ASMR Sounds
✨ Live Interaction
✨ Fun & Satisfying Videos

Then this channel is perfect for you!

I stream regularly and try to bring unique and entertaining content every day. Thank you so much for supporting and being part of this amazing journey ❤️

👉 Don’t forget to Subscribe and turn on the notification bell to never miss a live!

#CandyCount #ChocolateASMR #LiveCounting #ASMR #Satisfying

snippet.description:
Hi :)
My name is Marina and welcome to my channel!

Lifestyle, taste of goodies,drinks, perfect iced coffee, experiments, challenges, life hacks, DIY, beauty, fun video & something interesting;)

Not perfect, but real ! 🤪

snippet.title: MRCE 7
snippet.description:
📩 Business & Sponsorship Inquiries 👇

For business inquiries, brand collaborations, and sponsorship opportunities, please contact:

📧 Email: khanpial06@gmail.com

We are open to:
• Toy Reviews
• Surprise Egg Promotions
• Kids Product Collaborations
• Live Stream Sponsorships
• Brand Promotions

We will respond within 24–48 hours

🎉 Welcome to Our Surprise Egg Unboxing LIVE Channel! 🥚

Get ready for nonstop fun, colorful surprise eggs, and exciting toy reveals! We go LIVE to open chocolate eggs, discover amazing toys inside, and share the excitement with you in real time.

Every stream is full of surprises, energy, and family-friendly entertainment that everyone can enjoy.
🔴 Live Surprise Egg Unboxing
🎁 Cool & Rare Toy Reveals
🥚 Chocolate Egg Opening
🎊 Fun, Exciting & Family-Friendly Content

👉 Subscribe now and don’t miss the next big surprise! 🎉✨

Like 👍 Share 🔁 Subscribe 🔔

#asmr  #satisfying  #eggs #lives #kinderjoyeggs

snippet.title: Playing with Ayce
snippet.description:
This channel and most of its videos are made for a General Audience and not “directed to children” within the meaning of Title 16 C.F.R. §312.2, and are not intended specifically for children under 13 years of age. Playingwithayce does not collect any information from children under 13 years of age and expressly denies permission to any third-party seeking to collect information from children under 13 years of age on behalf of Channel. Further, Channel denies any and all liability or responsibility for the practices and policies of Youtube and its agents and subsidiaries, or any other affiliated third-party, regarding data collection.


Collaboration Email - playingwithayce@gmail.com

Business Inquiries- playingwithayce@gmail.com

snippet.title: Real Aba boys
snippet.description:
About
Welcome to Real Aba Boys, the home of comedy skits, Hilarious pranks and funny vines. 

At Real Aba Boys, our vision is to always make people laugh for we believe that, a single laugh can take away millions of  sorrows and bring more happiness and love.

Our videos have resonated with so many people around the world that we have gained millions of views and thousands of followers on social media and this makes us excited for it shows that our mission to always make people happy enough to laugh through our pranks and comedy videos is going well. 

All our pranks and comedy videos consist of topical humour, slapsticks, and farce. A perfect combination of laughing tools to entertaining  our esteem viewers.  

Join the Real Aba Boys family today by SUBSCRIBING to our YouTube Channel and turning ON the post notifications button so you never miss out on any opportunity to laugh out loud.

For Inquires & Deals : contact us on IG @Real_aba_boys @Lchisco140@gmail.com
